generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that over 60% of our critical infrastructure still relies on foreign-made components? This isn't just about national security—it's about protecting our civil liberties. When we depend on foreign suppliers, we're handing over control of our power grids, communication networks, and even emergency services to entities that may not have our best interests at heart. Strategic autonomy isn't about isolation; it's about ensuring that our preparedness and deterrence capabilities remain in our own hands. Let's not wait for a crisis to realize the importance of self-reliance. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
